zh.Of, Bernburg, Anhalt, Germany: 德國安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 波恩包格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena De Rügen於1270年出生時，她的父親Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen58歲，母親Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg31歲。她和Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg至少有3個兒子。她去世於1315年享年45歲。

zh-hans.Of, Bernburg, Anhalt, Germany: 德国安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 波恩包格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena De Rügen于1270年出生时，她的父亲Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen58岁，母亲Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg31岁。她和Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg至少有3个儿子。她去世于1315年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rügen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhardt.

variants.name: Ruge
meanings: nickname from Middle High German ruowe, rūge ‘quiet, calm’ or in the north from Low German rūg ‘rough, crude’.
from the personal name Rugo, a shortened form of Rüdiger (see Rudiger ).

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena De Rügen was born in 1270, her father, Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen, was 58 and her mother, Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 31. She had at least 3 sons with Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. She died in 1315, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena De Rügen est née en 1270, son père, Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. Elle est décédée en 1315, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena De Rügen 1270 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen 58 und ihre Mutter Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 31. Sie hatte mit Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1315 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena De Rügen è nata il nel 1270, sua padre, Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. Morì nel 1315, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Of, Bernburg, Anhalt, Germany: ドイツアンハルトランドクレイス バーンブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Helena De Rügenが1270年に生まれた時，父Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügenは58歳，母Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburgは31歳であった。彼女はCount Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburgとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1315年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena De Rügen(이)가 1270년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena De Rügen nasceu em 1270, seu pai, Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. Ela faleceu em 1315, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena De Rügen родилась в 1270 г., её отцу по имени Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. Она умерла в 1315 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena De Rügen nació en 1270, su papá, Wizlaw II. Fürst von Rügen, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Agnes Von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Count Bernhard II of Anhalt-Bernburg. Murió en 1315, a la edad de 45 años.
